SEARCH
Package dev.tagofabic.statefulbeans.spring.annotation

Annotation Interface SpringStatefulBeanTest

@Target(TYPE) @Retention(RUNTIME) @Documented @Inherited @ExtendWith(SpringStatefulBeanTestExtension.class) public @interface SpringStatefulBeanTest
Composite annotation for running stateful-bean checks against a live Spring ApplicationContext.

Use together with @SpringBootTest (or any other Spring test annotation that loads an ApplicationContext): 


 @SpringStatefulBeanTest(lombokAware = true)
 @SpringBootTest
 class StatefulBeanTest {
     // No test methods needed — the check runs automatically before the suite
 }

What happens

  1. @SpringBootTest loads the ApplicationContext.
  2. SpringStatefulBeanTestExtension extracts all user beans from the context and runs the stateful-bean analysis using the attributes declared on this annotation.

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    boolean
    allowInjectedFields
    When true (default), injection-annotated fields (@Autowired, @Value, etc.) are not flagged.
    boolean
    allowThreadLocalFields
    When true (default), ThreadLocal fields are not flagged.
    String[]
    excludeAnnotations
    Fully-qualified annotation names — bean classes carrying any of these will be skipped.
    String[]
    excludeClasses
    Fully-qualified class names to exclude from the check.
    boolean
    failOnViolation
    When true (default), the test fails on violations.
    boolean
    lombokAware
    Enable Lombok-aware detection (@Data, @Setter, etc.).

  • Element Details

    • lombokAware

      boolean lombokAware
      Enable Lombok-aware detection (@Data, @Setter, etc.).
      Default:
      false

    • failOnViolation

      boolean failOnViolation
      When true (default), the test fails on violations. Set to false to log warnings without failing — useful when introducing the check into an existing codebase.
      Default:
      true

    • excludeAnnotations

      String[] excludeAnnotations
      Fully-qualified annotation names — bean classes carrying any of these will be skipped.
      Default:
      {}

    • excludeClasses

      String[] excludeClasses
      Fully-qualified class names to exclude from the check.
      Default:
      {}

    • allowInjectedFields

      boolean allowInjectedFields
      When true (default), injection-annotated fields (@Autowired, @Value, etc.) are not flagged.
      Default:
      true

    • allowThreadLocalFields

      boolean allowThreadLocalFields
      When true (default), ThreadLocal fields are not flagged.
      Default:
      true
